title: UltraGen_All_Archives
author: hui, wang
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
The official repository for the article "Decoding the RNA binding systems by UltraGen" 
 Overview 
 We introduce UltraGen, an RNA language model designed to capture RNA binding properties. Utilizing fine-grained self-learning, UltraGen identifies RNA aptamers for a wide range of target sizes, including small molecules, proteins, cells, and tissue. Additionally, UltraGen discerns tissue specificity for millions RNA species across 22 human organs based on their 3’-UTR sequences, predicts the tropism of human-pathogenic RNA viruses, and characterizes SARS-CoV-2 replicase RNA binding at single-base resolution. 
 -------------------------------------------------------------------------- 
  This official repository provides comprehensive resources pertaining to the UltraGen model, encompassing datasets (including both pre-training corpora and downstream task-specific fine-tuning datasets), model implementations (containing pre-trained baseline models and task-optimized variants), along with the complete source code for UltraGen.  
 In this repository, you will find the following pre-training datasets and model checkpoints: 
 
 
 
 Model Name 
 Parameters 
 Pre-training Data 
 RNA Species Number 
 Description 
 Checkpoint 
 
 
 
 
 UltraGen 
 33.5M 
 UltraSelex SiR-B 
 10 million 
 pre-training  from scratch  
 UltraGen.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen source_SiR  
 33.5M 
 SELEX SiR 
 10 million 
 pre-training  from scratch  
 UltraGen_source_SiR.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen source-nsp12  
 33.5M 
 SELEX nsp12 
 10 million 
 pre-training  from scratch  
 UltraGen_source_nsp12.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen molecules  
 33.5M 
 12 SELEX targets’ training sets 
 3.24 million 
 continued pre-training the basic UltraGen model 
 UltraGen_molecule.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen 3UTR  
 33.5M 
 The preliminary 3’-UTR full training datasets 
 1.69 million 
 continued pre-training the basic UltraGen model 
 UltraGen_3UTR.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen plus  
 33.5M 
 12 SELEX targets’ training sets and the preliminary 3’-UTR full training datasets 
 4.93 million 
 continued pre-training the basic UltraGen model 
 UltraGen_plus.pkl 
 
 
 UltraGen RIP  
 33.5M 
 Human RIP-Seq in ENCODE 
 6.88 million 
 continued pre-training the basic UltraGen model 
 UltraGen_RIP.pkl 
 
 
 
 NOTE: 
 
 
 The pretraining data is located in the  Dataset Availability\1. Dataset for pre-training  folder. 
 
 
 The pretrained models can be found in the  Model Availability\1. Pre-training models  and  Model Availability\2. Continued pre-training models  folders. 
 
 
 The datasets for downstream tasks are in the  Dataset Availability\2. Dataset for fine-tuning  folder. 
 
 
 Additionally, this official repository provides supervised fine-tuned models based on the base UltraGen for downstream applications, including: RNA aptamer identification models targeting small molecules, proteins, cells, and tissues (12 specialized datasets), and tissue-specificity prediction for human mRNA 3'-UTR regions. These optimized models are archived under  Model Availability\3. Fine-tuned model .  The source code  UltraGen_source_code  provides implementations for pre-training, inference, and fine-tuning across various downstream tasks.
